entries.summary: Crypto majors rebound ahead of FOMC, despite oil surging, while Polymarket is making a push to enter the U.S.

entries.title: Ethereum ICO Whale Who Turned $3,100 Into $23M Wakes Up After a Decade
entries.summary: A wallet dormant since 2015 just moved 10,000 ETH—but analysts say a custody restructuring, not a sell, is the likely explanation.

entries.title: Judge Shoots Down Sam Bankman-Fried's Bid for New Trial
entries.summary: The judge dismissed the FTX founder’s claims that potential witnesses faced "government threats and retaliation" as "wildly conspiratorial.”

entries.title: AI Agent Deletes Startup’s Database in 9 Seconds, Founder Says
entries.summary: PocketOS founder Jeremy Crane claims a Cursor agent running Claude Opus wiped production data and backups through a single Railway API call.

entries.title: Woman Gets 71 Months in Prison Over Bitcoin Investment Fraud Targeting Elderly Victims
entries.summary: Federal prosecutors secured a prison term for a Saipan woman who defrauded elderly victims through a fake Bitcoin investment scheme

entries.title: OpenClaw Insider Builds the Enterprise Safety Layer the Project Never Shipped
entries.summary: Red Hat principal engineer and OpenClaw maintainer Sally O'Malley released Tank OS—a tool that sandboxes AI agents in isolated containers, keeping credentials locked and agents from interfering with each other or the host machine.

entries.title: CFTC Backs Prediction Markets in Yet Another Lawsuit Against a State
entries.summary: CFTC Chair Mike Selig has vowed to sue any state that attempts to regulate prediction markets under its own gambling laws.

entries.title: Dead Internet? A Third of New Websites Are AI-Generated, Says Stanford
entries.summary: A Stanford-led study quantified what everyone already suspected—but the findings aren't quite what people expected.

entries.title: Robinhood Shares Slide on 34% Decrease in Crypto Revenue
entries.summary: Retail brokerage Robinhood's business has gotten a boost from prediction markets, though its crypto trading revenue fell in Q1.

entries.title: Google DeepMind Veteran Raises $1.1 Billion to Build AI That Isn’t Trained With Human Data
entries.summary: Ineffable Intelligence is betting that reinforcement learning is the path to superintelligence, rather than AI's large language models.

entries.title: Soldier Charged in Polymarket Insider Trading Case Pleads Not Guilty
entries.summary: Special forces member Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly used inside knowledge of a Venezuelan military operation to make nearly $400K profit on Polymarket.

entries.title: Google Signs AI Deal With Pentagon for Classified Work as Employees Object
entries.summary: Google faces internal backlash as it signs a Pentagon AI deal for classified military work.

entries.title: IREN Price Target Cut as Bernstein Sees Firm Dumping Bitcoin Mining for AI
entries.summary: Bernstein analysts see IREN’s AI cloud prospects growing substantially in the coming years—and its Bitcoin business disappearing entirely.

entries.title: Aave, Compound Unveil Technical Plan to Address Fallout From $290M Kelp DAO Hack
entries.summary: Major DeFi protocols outlined technical steps to eliminate bad debt and restore full backing for exploited rsETH tokens.

entries.title: Stablecoin Giant Tether Reveals Plans for Modular Bitcoin Mining Hardware
entries.summary: Leading stablecoin issuer Tether has teamed with Canaan and ACME Swisstech to develop customizable, upgradable Bitcoin mining rigs.

entries.title: Inside Trump’s Meme Coin Bash: Foreign Guests, Iran War Riffs, and Mar-a-Lago Charm
entries.summary: The president discussed policy, technology, and war with his top meme coin holders on Saturday at a private Mar-a-Lago gathering.

entries.title: Hyperliquid Gains Counter $216 Million Q1 Loss at Novogratz's Galaxy Digital
entries.summary: CEO Mike Novogratz said Galaxy Digital’s balance sheet suffered because crypto prices are down, yet Hyperliquid partially offset losses.

entries.title: Meta Turns to Space-Based Solar Energy to Power AI Data Centers on Earth
entries.summary: Facebook parent company Meta secured up to 1 gigawatt of orbital solar power as AI drives demand for electricity.

entries.title: White House Crypto Adviser Hints at ‘Breakthrough’ Bitcoin Reserve Move
entries.summary: A "big announcement" on the U.S. Bitcoin strategic reserve could drop soon, but Treasury and a stalled Senate bill continue to set limits.

entries.title: Bitcoin's Next Move Hinges on $82K CME Gap as Earnings, FOMC Loom
entries.summary: Big Tech earnings and the FOMC are challenging investor risk appetite, with $82K as a make-or-break level for Bitcoin’s recovery rally.

entries.title: Morning Minute: Fidelity Is Cautiously Bullish on Crypto
entries.summary: Fidelity says crypto may finally be finding its floor, while the White House is teasing a major strategic Bitcoin reserve update.

entries.title: OpenAI Fell Short of Its Own Targets as Compute Costs Piled Up: Report
entries.summary: Internal stumbles over ChatGPT growth and a looming IPO are putting Sam Altman's spend-everything compute strategy under the microscope.

entries.title: Jack Dorsey's Block Discloses $2.2B Bitcoin Holdings in Q1 Proof-of-Reserves Report
entries.summary: The fintech company's third-party audited disclosure shows $1.5 billion in customer Bitcoin and $692 million in corporate treasury holdings.

entries.title: Elon Musk’s Fight With Colorado Over AI Law Hits Pause as State Considers Revisions
entries.summary: The joint motion halts deadlines and enforcement in xAI’s lawsuit while Colorado lawmakers weigh changes to the state’s AI bias law.

entries.title: Aave-Led 'DeFi United' Relief Effort Raises $300 Million to Cover Kelp DAO Exploit Losses
entries.summary: The Aave-led relief effort has gained widespread support, securing enough commitments to replenish the swiped funds.

entries.title: OpenAI Is Building Its Own Smartphone Chip With Qualcomm and MediaTek: Report
entries.summary: Six weeks after telling staff to stop chasing distractions, OpenAI is reportedly planning a phone targeting 400 million units a year.

entries.title: Bitcoin Developer Plans to 'Reassign' Coins Linked to Satoshi Nakamoto in Hard Fork
entries.summary: Paul Sztorc’s proposed eCash fork would give investors coins cloned from wallets believed to belong to Bitcoin creator Satoshi Nakamoto.

entries.title: Taylor Swift Seeks Trademarks for Her Voice and Image to Fight AI Fakes
entries.summary: The trademark applications aim to strengthen her ability to fight AI-generated deepfakes, as image generation tools advance.

entries.title: Fed Confirms What Tech Developers Have Feared for Two Years
entries.summary: A new Federal Reserve study links ChatGPT's launch to a sharp halving of U.S. programmer job growth—the first institutional-level evidence connecting AI adoption to measurable developer hiring declines.

entries.title: Malicious Web Pages Are Hijacking AI Agents, And Some Are Going After Your PayPal
entries.summary: Google's security team scanned billions of web pages and found real payloads designed to trick AI agents into sending money, deleting files, and leaking credentials.

entries.title: Google Employees Demand CEO Block Military AI Contracts in Open Letter
entries.summary: Some 580 Google employees have signed the letter to CEO Sundar Pichai, citing ethical concerns over military use of AI.

entries.title: Publicly Traded Strive Buys $60 Million in Bitcoin, Plans BTC Business Summit
entries.summary: Strive Inc. purchased 789 more Bitcoin while its subsidiary prepares to educate business leaders on corporate crypto adoption.

entries.title: Trump Walks Back Prediction Market Criticism, Says 'Smart People' He Knows Like Them
entries.summary: Trump said last week he didn’t like prediction markets, but then changed his tune, arguing the U.S. should not get left behind in the space.

entries.title: Crypto Exchange Gemini Launches Agentic Trading Feature for AI Agents
entries.summary: Gemini has integrated AI models like Claude and ChatGPT to execute automated trading strategies via an open protocol.

entries.title: Stable Sea taps WisdomTree to bring tokenized Treasury access to small and medium-sized businesses
entries.summary: “We want to be the default for 'money at rest' within the onchain space,” WisdomTree Head of Digital Assets Will Peck said.

entries.title: ‘DeFi bent, not broken’: Standard Chartered says rsETH episode won’t derail path to $2T RWA market
entries.summary: The bank said DeFi’s $300 million-plus rescue effort and structural upgrades reinforce its long-term $2 trillion real-world asset thesis.

entries.title: Ripple, OKX expand RLUSD access with over 280 spot pairs, derivatives use
entries.summary: OKX customers can now use RLUSD 'to trade and collateralize positions across both spot and derivatives markets.'

entries.title: First prediction market ETFs could launch next week, Bloomberg analyst says
entries.summary: Roundhill’s SEC filing set a May 5 effective date for its prediction market ETFs, which analysts say could pave the way for a launch next week.

entries.title: Bernstein sees Robinhood Q1 miss as priced in, maintains $130 target implying 58% upside
entries.summary: Bernstein maintained a $130 price target for Robinhood after a Q1 miss, highlighting its record 8.8B event contracts and $17B margin book.

entries.title: ‘This is the future’: Czech central bank governor makes case for bitcoin in sovereign reserves
entries.summary: Czech National Bank Governor Ales Michl told Bitcoin 2026 that BTC can improve reserve portfolios without materially increasing risk.

entries.title: ZetaChain identifies cross-chain messaging loophole as root of targeted exploit
entries.summary: ZetaChain's post-mortem explained that the attacker took advantage of three vulnerabilities to drain $333,868 from team wallets.

entries.title: US court sentences Cartier descendant to 8 years in $470 million crypto laundering case
entries.summary: A US court sentenced Maximilien de Hoop Cartier to 8 years for operating an unlicensed crypto exchange that laundered more than $470 million.

entries.title: Syndicate suffers exploit linked to Commons bridge compromise; SYND slides 36%
entries.summary: The Syndicate team said it is investigating the incident with security firms and exploring options to 'make people whole.'

entries.title: Hong Kong warns of fake tokens posing as HSBC’s stablecoin
entries.summary: HSBC and Anchorpoint Financial both clarified that they have not launched any stablecoins in Hong Kong, but plan to do so this year.

entries.title: Ethereum ICO whale moves $23 million in ETH after 10-year dormancy
entries.summary: The Ethereum whale address received the ETH on July 30, 2015, after participating in the ICO event with $3,100.

entries.title: Canada moves to ban crypto ATMs, labeling them as ‘primary method’ for fraud
entries.summary: The government said it aims to shut down a 'primary method' used by scammers to defraud victims and facilitate money laundering.

entries.title: Pump.fun burns $370 million in PUMP token, commits 50% of future revenue for buyback-burn program
entries.summary: The remaining 50% will be used to make 'big bets' to grow the platform in the coming five to 10 years, co-founder Alon Cohen said.

entries.title: Judge rejects Sam Bankman-Fried’s new trial request, slams claims as ‘wildly conspiratorial’
entries.summary: U.S. District Judge Lewis Kaplan declined former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried's request for a new trial. An appeal is still pending.

entries.title: Robinhood’s Q1 crypto revenue and trading volume fall nearly 50%
entries.summary: The company reported a 7% year-over-year increase in transaction revenues, posting a total of $623 million for the quarter.

entries.title: LayerZero commits 10,000 ETH to DeFi United effort
entries.summary: Kelp says it used the default configuration for its LayerZero-powered Decentralized Verifier Network that was exploited.

entries.title: Ostium upgrades backend, adds offchain institutional liquidity providers like Jump
entries.summary: Following a major backend overhaul, Ostium pitches itself as a “decentralized execution layer” for global markets.

entries.title: Strategy-fueled bitcoin rally could last ‘for some time to come,’ Bitwise CIO says
entries.summary: Strategy issuing STRC has helped the company accumulate over $7 billion worth of BTC in recent weeks, Bitwise says.

entries.title: Alchemy and Privy roll out technical integration to smooth pain points of ‘onchain finance’
entries.summary: Alchemy and Privy are rolling out a technical integration in an attempt to smooth the pain points of using crypto.

entries.title: CFTC sues Wisconsin escalating federal-state clash over prediction market oversight
entries.summary: The CFTC is pushing back against the state of Wisconsin with its own lawsuit against the governor and other government officials.
